BadRequestError.description: Invalid request payload or missing required fields

ValidationError.description: Request failed DTO (Zod) validation — error carries the flattened field issues

ForbiddenError.description: Authenticated but not authorised to perform this action

kind.description: Subrazão: contas a pagar (payable) ou a receber (receivable)

asOf.description: Date-only YYYY-MM-DD — data da posição (default hoje). Vencido = dueDate < as_of
Date-only YYYY-MM-DD — inclusive upper bound; window is 1 Jan of that year → asOf

name.description: Nome de exibição — chave de negócio por [unidade, tipo, nome]

ref.description: Ref opcional escopada a uma linha de DynamicTable (não é FK)

code.description: Stable axis key, e.g. COST_CENTER | PROJECT (unique per unit)

name.description: Display label, e.g. Centro de Custo

definitionId.description: The axis this value belongs to

code.description: Stable value key within the axis, unique per axis

parentId.description: Optional rollup parent — MUST belong to the same axis (ACC-026)

definitionId.description: The dimension axis to slice by

from.description: ISO date — inclusive lower bound on the entry date

to.description: ISO date — inclusive upper bound on the entry date

supplierRef.description: Ref escopada a uma linha de fornecedor em DynamicTable (F1 rota c) — não é FK

counterpartyId.description: FK opcional a uma Counterparty(SUPPLIER) desta unidade (INCR-COUNTERPARTY / A1); re-escopada no service (SEC-A1-1)

documentNumber.description: Nº da NF/documento; parte da chave de negócio

expenseAccountId.description: Id de uma conta-folha nature=Expense (contrapartida do reconhecimento)

attachmentId.description: Id de um DocumentAttachment já enviado, anexado ao lançamento de reconhecimento (F4)

paidAt.description: Data-only YYYY-MM-DD — data EFETIVA do débito bancário (D9), não a data do clique

amountCents.description: MVP: deve igualar o saldo do payable (pagamento integral único)

reversalDate.description: Data-only YYYY-MM-DD do estorno do reconhecimento (gate de período na data do estorno, T5)
Data-only YYYY-MM-DD do estorno da liquidação

asOfCurrent.description: as-of date of the current period

asOfPrevious.description: as-of date of the comparison period

dimensions.description: Optional dimension VALUE ids tagging this leg (INCR-DIM). At most one value per axis (the axis is derived from the value; a second value of the same axis is rejected). Metadata only — does NOT affect Σdébito=Σcrédito (ACC-024).

date.description: Date-only string YYYY-MM-DD (parsed as UTC midnight — no time component)

sourceDocument.description: Optional origin descriptor (BE-INCR-8). When present, postEntry records a SourceDocument + JournalEntrySource in the same tx. Absent for manual/reversal. Does NOT affect idempotency (sourceId) — externalRef is the human document reference, separate from the dedup key (D6).

externalRef.description: Human document reference (NF nº X, boleto nº Y) — separate from sourceId/idempotency

documentDate.description: Date-only YYYY-MM-DD of the source document, when distinct from the posting date

attachmentId.description: DocumentAttachment id of the raw file (INCR-5), when any

rawJson.description: Optional JSON snapshot of the origin

reversalPostingDate.description: Date-only string YYYY-MM-DD for the reversal entry (and period gate)

from.description: ISO date string — inclusive lower bound

to.description: ISO date string — inclusive upper bound

requiresDimension.description: When true, every leg to this account must carry ≥1 dimension tag (MVP = any axis). Prospective — never retro-rejects history (SEC-B1-5).

customerRef.description: Ref escopada a uma linha de cliente em DynamicTable (F1 rota c) — não é FK

counterpartyId.description: FK opcional a uma Counterparty(CUSTOMER) desta unidade (INCR-COUNTERPARTY / A1); re-escopada no service (SEC-A1-1)

documentNumber.description: Nº da fatura/duplicata; parte da chave de negócio

revenueAccountId.description: Id de uma conta-folha nature=Revenue (contrapartida do reconhecimento)

attachmentId.description: Id de um DocumentAttachment já enviado, anexado ao lançamento de reconhecimento (F4)

receivedAt.description: Data-only YYYY-MM-DD — data EFETIVA do crédito bancário (D9), não a data do clique

amountCents.description: MVP: deve igualar o saldo do receivable (recebimento integral único)

reversalDate.description: Data-only YYYY-MM-DD do estorno do reconhecimento (gate de período na data do estorno, T5)
Data-only YYYY-MM-DD do estorno do recebimento

q.description: substring filter on code or name

get.summary: Comprovante de lançamento (PDF) for a single journal entry

403.description: Not authorized to read the ledger

get.summary: Balanço Patrimonial — snapshot as_of a given date
DRE — year_to_date from 1 Jan of asOf.year through asOf

parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD — period end date; fromDate is computed as 1 Jan of that year

get.summary: DFC — Demonstração do Fluxo de Caixa (método indireto), year_to_date

parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD — inclusive upper bound; window is 1 Jan of that year → asOf

200.description: Tie-out report (3 checks com differenceCents inteiro exato e status OK/DIVERGENT)

get.summary: List accounting periods for a fiscal year

post.summary: Seed 12 FUTURE periods for a fiscal year
Open a FUTURE or SOFT_CLOSED period → OPEN
post.description: periodSemantics: as_of. Transition recorded in AccountingPeriodTransition.

post.summary: Soft-close an OPEN period (can be reopened)
Permanently close a period (HARD_CLOSED = terminal)
Reopen a SOFT_CLOSED period → OPEN (HARD_CLOSED is terminal)

Estimate token cost for a file before uploading

get.summary: Get Qdrant vector collection status

get.summary: Get a document by ID
Get Qdrant vector points for a specific document
List all dynamic tables for the current user

post.summary: Resolve relation values across tables (batch lookup)
Additively evolve an installed table's schema from its preset (admin-only)
post.description: Computes the additive delta (new fields + new select options) between the preset module and the user's installed table identified by internalName, then applies it via the engine's revalidating schema update. Never removes/renames fields or options. Idempotent: a second call with no preset changes is a no-op. Requires ADMIN role.

internalName.description: Stable preset key of the installed table (e.g. 'leads')

post.summary: Install ONE new table from its preset into an already-installed tenant (admin-only)
post.description: Idempotently installs a single preset table (identified by internalName) for the current tenant. If the table already exists it is a no-op (created=false). Relation markers (@@PRESET_TABLE_KEY::x) are resolved to the user's REAL installed table ids; a missing dependency table yields 404. Requires ADMIN role.

internalName.description: Stable preset key of the table to install (e.g. 'crmOpportunities')

get.summary: Get a dynamic table schema by ID
Get all data rows for a dynamic table

post.summary: Create a new data row in a dynamic table

schema.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs matching the table schema fields

put.summary: Update a data row in a dynamic table

schema.description: Fields to update – merges with existing row data

delete.summary: Delete a data row from a dynamic table

post.summary: Soft-delete multiple data rows in a dynamic table (atomic)
post.description: Deletes up to 200 rows in a single transaction. Every id must belong to the given table and the caller; if any id is cross-tenant or foreign the whole batch rolls back (404).

post.summary: Create a new dashboard (installs table preset suite for the user)
post.description: Accepts either a quick creation payload (suiteKey) or a custom preset payload (presetKey + optional removedTables / addedFields). Returns 403 if the user already has tables configured.

get.summary: Get all dynamic tables belonging to the current user (dashboard data)
List available dashboard preset suites
Get a specific dashboard preset by key
Get sidebar category counts for the current user's tables

200.description: Array of category entries with display info and table count

delete.summary: Delete all tables and data for the current user (reset dashboard)

get.summary: List the current user's saved views for a table

post.summary: Create a saved view

get.summary: List all analytics preset groups for the current user

parameters.description: Filter by a specific preset key

get.summary: Get resolved chart data for a given analytics key
Get drill-down row data for specific record IDs from a table

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of field names to return (all if omitted)

get.summary: Auto-discover KPI suggestions for a dynamic table
Get analytics preset groups for a specific preset key
Get chart data scoped to a preset
Get paginated detail rows for a chart data point
List persisted analytics definitions for the current user

Generate an AI chat completion

Get an existing chat instance by widget ID or create one

Generate chart data via Server-Sent Events stream

post.summary: Advance a lead to a target stage (with optional proposal side-effect)
Create a standalone proposal and refresh the lead snapshot
Record a meeting no-show (reschedule or revert the lead stage)
Convert a lead into an Account (+ optional Contact), atomically

201.description: Created account + contact and the updated (converted) lead

post.summary: Advance an opportunity to a target stage (first-class Opportunity)
Create a first-class opportunity from a lead (the lead is NOT consumed)

get.summary: Aggregated CRM KPI bundle over the leads dataset

200.description: Keyed bundle of chart-ready KPI series (cards, funnel, source, status, bant, proposals, activities)

post.summary: Upload a downloadable file attachment for a CRM record

415.description: File type not supported or content/type mismatch

get.summary: List active attachments for a CRM record
Download an attachment binary (streamed)

delete.summary: Soft-delete an attachment (and remove its binary)

post.summary: Cancel a finalized salon sale (status → Cancelled; reverses the revenue entry)

reason.description: Optional reason recorded on the sale (audit).

post.summary: Return a finalized salon sale (status → Returned; books a contra-revenue entry)

reason.description: Optional reason recorded on the sale (audit).

post.summary: Register payment for a finalized salon sale (paymentStatus → Paid; books the settlement entry)
post.description: The only sanctioned path to move a Finalized sale to Paid. Performs a whitelisted isSystem write (paymentStatus/paymentMethod/paidAt/paidByUserId/paymentReference) and, post-commit, books D <account by paymentMethod> / C 1.1.2 A Receber (sourceType salon.sale.settled). Settlement is deferred if the revenue entry does not yet exist.

paidAt.description: ISO datetime the payment occurred (settlement date). Defaults to now.

post.summary: Post a balanced double-entry journal entry
post.description: ΣdebitCents must equal ΣcreditCents (exact integer equality). Idempotent on (sourceType, sourceId) per unit.

data.description: The posted journal entry with its postings

post.summary: Reverse a posted journal entry (estorno)
post.description: Posted entries are immutable; corrections are made via a reversing entry. Idempotent — reversing twice returns the existing reversal.

200.description: Reversing entry created (or the existing one if already reversed)

get.summary: Trial balance (balancete) for a unit
get.description: Aggregates Posted + Reversed postings (Draft excluded) per account.

get.summary: Per-account ledger (razão) for a unit
List the chart of accounts for a unit

post.summary: Create a user-defined account in the chart of accounts

delete.description: unitId is required so the delete is scoped to its unit. Canonical accounts and accounts with postings cannot be deleted.

409.description: Account is canonical or has postings — cannot be deleted

get.summary: List journal entries (lançamentos) for a unit, paginated

post.summary: Upload documentary evidence to a journal entry

get.summary: Download an attachment binary by id

delete.summary: Soft-delete an attachment (binary retained for audit)

get.summary: List attachments for a journal entry

post.summary: Export a report or blank import template to CSV/XLSX
post.description: Renders read-only report data (trial balance, ledger, BP, DRE) or a blank import template; persists the artifact and returns a job. Download via /jobs/{jobId}/download.

post.summary: Generate the SPED Contábil (ECD) .txt file for a year
post.description: Composes the ECD (Livro Diário Geral, tipo G) for the given year from the ledger (chart, referential mapping, monthly balances, journal, BP/DRE) and persists a plain-text (ISO-8859-1) artifact as an EXPORT job. Download via /data-exchange/jobs/{jobId}/download. Blocks with 400 + unmappedAccounts if any leaf account is unmapped in the referential version (coverage gate).

post.summary: Generate the SPED Fiscal (ECF) .txt file for a year (Lucro Presumido)
post.description: Composes the ECF for the given calendar year (Lucro Presumido) and persists a plain-text (ISO-8859-1) artifact as an EXPORT job. Luminaris supplies the gross revenue segregated by activity per quarter (3.1 services to P200/P400 32 percent, 3.3 resale to P200 8 percent / P400 12 percent); the PVA-ECF computes the tax. Recovered blocks (C, E, J, K) are emitted as empty markers. Download via /data-exchange/jobs/{jobId}/download. Blocks with 400 + unmappedRevenueAccounts when a Revenue account with movement is not one of 3.1 / 3.3 (revenue exhaustiveness gate).

post.summary: Close the result of a fiscal year (encerramento do exercício)
post.description: Posts a real balanced closing entry (sourceType closing) dated year-12-31 that zeroes every result account against retained earnings (Lucros ou Prejuízos Acumulados). Idempotent per exercise. Makes the ECD reconcile in value (I155 of December equals zero, J100 balances with detail) and enables the I350/I355 registers. Blocks with 400 when there is no result balance to close; the period gate surfaces its own error when December is not open. Reopen by reversing the returned entry via POST /accounting/reverse (that frees the idempotency key).

201.description: Closing entry posted (or the existing one on a re-close)

data.description: The posted closing JournalEntry with its postings

get.summary: Get a data-exchange job summary
Download a data-exchange artifact (CSV/XLSX stream)

post.summary: Upload + validate a CSV/XLSX import (chart, opening balances, or journal entries)
post.description: Parses and per-row validates the file, staging a VALIDATED job. Does NOT write ledger data — call /jobs/{jobId}/commit to persist. Preview rows via /jobs/{jobId}/rows.

get.summary: List import rows (preview + error report)

post.summary: Commit a staged import (writes accounts / journal entries via posting services)
post.description: Commits VALID rows through createAccount/postEntry (authoritative period gate + balance re-checked in-tx). Per-entry atomic, partial success. Idempotent — already-committed rows are skipped.

post.summary: Import a bank statement (CSV/XLSX/OFX/CNAB) for a bank GL account
post.description: Accepts CSV/XLSX (columns date,amountCents,description[,externalRef], signed integer cents), OFX (normalized from STMTTRN - DTPOSTED→date, TRNAMT→signed cents, NAME/MEMO→description, FITID→externalRef) or CNAB 240 (Segmento E extrato — DDMMAAAA→date, 18-digit value→signed cents by D/C indicator, histórico→description, document number→externalRef). Format is auto-detected. ALL-OR-NOTHING — any invalid row rejects the whole file; a multi-account OFX/CNAB and a CNAB 400 file are rejected. Re-import of the same file (sha256) is idempotent (200, nothing written). No ledger value is written.

get.summary: List imported bank statements (paginated)
List the lines of a statement (optional status filter)

delete.summary: Soft-delete a statement (blocked while any match is active)

post.summary: Run the deterministic auto-match over UNMATCHED lines (D6)
post.description: Commits ONLY single-candidate lines (exact cents + direction, ±3-day window, entry Posted, no active match). 0 or >1 candidates leave the line pending. Idempotent by construction. May flip fully-matched entries Posted→Reconciled (derived, audited).

get.summary: Ranked match suggestions for one UNMATCHED line (|Δdays| asc, postingId asc)

post.summary: Mark/unmark a line as IGNORED (e.g. a fee to be posted via /post)
Manual match — N postings ↔ 1 statement line (D3 aggregation)
post.description: Aggregate invariant: Σ(posting side amounts) === |line.amountCents| (exact integer cents). Full in-tx gate per posting; may flip the entry Posted→Reconciled.

post.summary: Soft-undo of an active match (trail preserved; may flip the entry back to Posted)

get.summary: Pending report — UNMATCHED lines + bank postings with no active match (as-of)

put.summary: Set (upsert) a referential mapping of one leaf account in one version (BE-INCR-9)

delete.summary: Unset (hard-delete) the mapping of one account in one version (BE-INCR-9)

200.description: accountId + mappingVersion of the removed mapping

get.summary: List the referential mappings of a version (BE-INCR-9)

200.description: array of ReferentialMapping for the version

post.summary: Batch set (upsert) many leaf-account mappings in one version, atomically (BE-INCR-9B)
post.description: All-or-nothing (D8) — every item is upserted in a single transaction with the per-item account-liveness + leaf gate re-checked in-tx; one bad item rolls the whole batch back. Duplicate accountId within the batch is rejected.

post.summary: Copy every mapping of one version into another (year inheritance, BE-INCR-9B)
post.description: Copies each mapping of fromVersion into toVersion in one transaction (D6), re-snapshotting the label literally (D9). Existing target rows are upserted in place (never P2002). Reuses the per-item set gate, so it is all-or-nothing.

200.description: array of upserted ReferentialMapping in the destination version

get.summary: Coverage diagnostic — active leaf accounts unmapped in a version (ECD-readiness gate, BE-INCR-9)
Authoring skeleton — unmapped leaf accounts of a version as a batch template (BE-INCR-9B)
get.description: Chart-driven (D5) — reuses coverage().unmappedAccounts, shaped as a fill-in-the-blanks template for batch authoring. Never invents an RFB code.

200.description: unitId + mappingVersion + items[] (unmapped leaf accounts to author)

post.summary: Import the official RFB referential CATALOG for a layout version (BE-INCR-9B Track B)
post.description: Uploads a CSV/XLSX (multipart field `file`) of the official referential layout and upserts it into the GLOBAL catalog, idempotent per layoutVersion. All-or-nothing; invents no code (isAnalytic is read from the file, D1/I052). Enables analytic-only destination validation.

get.summary: Lookup/picker over a version's referential catalog (BE-INCR-9B Track B)
get.description: Lists a layout version's referential accounts for the code picker; filter by substring (q) and restrict to analytic (leaf) destinations (analyticOnly).

200.description: referential accounts of the version (code, name, isAnalytic, parentCode)

get.summary: List payables for the unit (Contas a Pagar, INCR-AP)

post.summary: Create a payable and book its recognition entry
post.description: Books the recognition (debit the chosen expense account, credit 2.1.2 Fornecedores a Pagar) dated the issueDate (competência). On a synchronous posting failure the row is compensated (soft-delete). The nota flows into the SourceDocument provenance seam.

post.summary: Re-drive missing recognitions/settlements (D4 safety net)
post.description: Idempotent maintenance pass that re-posts any missing recognition or settlement entry and finalizes a payable stranded in PAYING after a crash between the ledger post and the finalize step.

200.description: counts of recognitions/settlements posted and payables finalized

get.summary: Read one payable with its payments

post.summary: Register the full payment and book the settlement
post.description: Closes the double-payment race with an atomic OPEN to PAYING transition, then books the settlement (debit 2.1.2, credit the account for the method) dated the effective debit date, and moves the payable to PAID. MVP is a single full payment.

post.summary: Cancel an open payable (reverse the recognition)
post.description: Reverses the recognition entry on the reversalDate (its own period gate) and flips the payable to CANCELLED, freeing the business key. A paid payable must have its payment cancelled first.

post.summary: Cancel a payment (reverse the settlement and reopen the payable)

get.summary: List receivables for the unit (Contas a Receber, INCR-AR)

post.summary: Create a receivable and book its recognition entry
post.description: Books the recognition (debit 1.1.5 Clientes a Receber, credit the chosen revenue account) dated the issueDate (competência). On a synchronous posting failure the row is compensated (soft-delete). The fatura flows into the SourceDocument provenance seam. AR-formal is for manual customer invoices, not salon sales (already booked by the bridge).

post.summary: Re-drive missing recognitions/receipts (D4 safety net)
post.description: Idempotent maintenance pass that re-posts any missing recognition or receipt entry and finalizes a receivable stranded in RECEIVING after a crash between the ledger post and the finalize step.

200.description: counts of recognitions/receipts posted and receivables finalized

get.summary: Read one receivable with its receipts

post.summary: Register the full receipt and book the entry
post.description: Closes the double-receipt race with an atomic OPEN to RECEIVING transition, then books the receipt (debit the account for the method, credit 1.1.5) dated the effective credit date, and moves the receivable to RECEIVED. MVP is a single full receipt.

post.summary: Cancel an open receivable (reverse the recognition)
post.description: Reverses the recognition entry on the reversalDate (its own period gate) and flips the receivable to CANCELLED, freeing the business key. A received receivable must have its receipt cancelled first.

post.summary: Cancel a receipt (reverse the entry and reopen the receivable)

get.summary: List entries awaiting approval (maker-checker queue, ADR-INCR-APPROVAL)

200.description: paginated PendingApproval entries with their legs

post.summary: Create a draft journal entry with its legs (no number, no ledger impact yet)

put.summary: Replace a draft entry content (edit after rejection)

post.summary: Submit a draft for approval (freezes the content hash, moves to PendingApproval)
Approve and post a submitted entry (checker; segregation of duties)
post.description: Approves and posts atomically. The approver must NOT be the creator or submitter (dynamic SoD, server-side). Assigns the gapless entryNumber inside the tx, re-checks the period gate and the frozen content hash. Fails 403 on a SoD violation, 409 on a stale version.

403.description: SoD violation (approver is the creator or submitter)

post.summary: Reject a submitted entry back to Draft

get.summary: List the dimension catalog — axes + their values (INCR-DIM)
get.description: Returns each dimension definition (axis, e.g. cost center / project) with its values (flat, carrying parentId — the rollup tree is in the data). A dimension is metadata orthogonal to the ledger (ACC-024).

post.summary: Create a dimension axis (cost center, project…)
Archive an axis (its values must be archived first)
Create a value in an axis (optional rollup parent, same axis — ACC-026)
Archive a value (its children must be archived first; historical tags preserved)

get.summary: Balancete recortado por dimensão (per account within each value, with rollup)
get.description: Trial-balance sliced by one axis. Each dimension value gets its own + rolled-up (descendants via parentId) debit/credit/balance, plus a "(sem dimensão)" bucket for untagged legs. Summing every bucket reproduces the trial balance for the window (ACC-024).

200.description: buckets per dimension value with account rows + rollup

get.summary: DRE por dimensão (Revenue/Expense net per value, with rollup)
get.description: Income statement sliced by one axis: revenue (credit-normal) minus expense (debit-normal) per dimension value, own + rolled-up, plus a "(sem dimensão)" bucket. Read-only.

200.description: result buckets per dimension value with rollup
